summary: Iteration 26 - Prediction Streak Feature Testing Complete. 15/15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: StreakBanner component renders on HomePage with all streak states (BUILD IT, HOT STREAK, LEGENDARY), Streak King banner shows when another user has streak >= 3, fire animations and glowing borders work correctly.

backend.admin_login: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns token for admin
backend.player_login: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns token for player
backend.top_streak_public: PASS - GET /api/contests/global/top-streak is public, returns streaks array
backend.my_streak_with_auth: PASS - Returns current_streak, max_streak, is_hot, multiplier, next_milestone
backend.auth_me_streak_fields: PASS - GET /api/auth/me includes prediction_streak and max_prediction_streak
backend.auth_me_streak_initialized: PASS - Streak fields are properly initialized (not null)
backend.update_user_streaks_function: PASS - Function exists and is callable
backend.top_streak_is_hot_flag: PASS - is_hot flag correctly set based on streak >= 5
backend.top_streak_sorted: PASS - Top streaks sorted by current_streak descending

frontend.streak_banner_component: PASS - StreakBanner component found with data-testid='streak-banner'
frontend.my_streak_card: PASS - My streak card found with data-testid='my-streak-card'
frontend.build_it_state: PASS - 'BUILD IT' label shown when streak is 0
frontend.instruction_text: PASS - '5 consecutive correct predictions for 2x bonus' text shown when streak=0
frontend.hot_streak_state: PASS - 'HOT STREAK' label and '2x POINTS' badge shown when streak >= 5
frontend.legendary_state: PASS - 'LEGENDARY' label and '4x POINTS' badge shown when streak >= 10
frontend.streak_king_banner: PASS - Streak King banner shows when another user has streak >= 3
frontend.streak_king_count: PASS - Streak King's streak count displayed
frontend.streak_king_bonus: PASS - Streak King bonus indicator (2x/4x) shown
frontend.fire_icon: PASS - Fire icon (SVG) found in streak card
frontend.hot_border_animation: PASS - Hot streak border animation class applied
frontend.fire_icon_animation: PASS - Fire icon animation class applied
frontend.dual_banner_position: PASS - StreakBanner positioned between PredictionBadge and Dual Banner

critical_code_review_comments: settlement_engine.py: get_streak_multiplier() function correctly implements 5+=2x, 10+=4x logic
settlement_engine.py: update_user_streaks() properly batch updates streaks and calculates bonus points
settlement_engine.py: _resolve_question_internal() includes Phase 2 streak updates and Phase 3 bonus application
contests.py: /global/top-streak endpoint correctly queries users with prediction_streak >= 1 and sorts descending
contests.py: /global/my-streak endpoint returns all required fields including streak_to_next calculation
schemas.py: User model includes prediction_streak and max_prediction_streak fields with default 0
schemas.py: UserResponse includes prediction_streak and max_prediction_streak for API responses
StreakBanner.jsx: Well-structured component with proper data-testid attributes for all elements
StreakBanner.jsx: Correctly handles all streak tiers (BUILD IT, WARMING UP, HOT STREAK, LEGENDARY)
StreakBanner.jsx: Streak King banner only shows when another user has streak >= 3
StreakBanner.jsx: Progress bar shows progression toward next milestone (5 for 2x, 10 for 4x)
App.css: Streak CSS animations properly defined (streakBorderGlow, streakFirePulse, streakParticleRise, etc.)
seed_data_creation: Temporarily modified user streaks in MongoDB for testing different states (BUILD IT, HOT STREAK, LEGENDARY, Streak King). Reset to 0 after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified Prediction Streak feature. Key findings: (1) GET /api/contests/global/top-streak returns users sorted by prediction_streak descending, includes is_hot flag, (2) GET /api/contests/global/my-streak returns current_streak, max_streak, is_hot, multiplier, next_milestone, streak_to_next - requires auth, (3) GET /api/auth/me now includes prediction_streak and max_prediction_streak fields, (4) StreakBanner component renders on HomePage between PredictionBadge and Dual Banner, (5) Streak tiers: BUILD IT (0-2), WARMING UP (3-4), HOT STREAK (5-9, 2x), LEGENDARY (10+, 4x), (6) Streak King banner shows when another user has streak >= 3 and is not the current user, (7) Fire animations and glowing borders work correctly for hot streaks, (8) Settlement engine update_user_streaks() function updates streaks and applies bonus multipliers.

features_verified.top_streak_api: VERIFIED - GET /api/contests/global/top-streak returns ranked list with is_hot flag
features_verified.my_streak_api: VERIFIED - GET /api/contests/global/my-streak returns streak info with multiplier
features_verified.auth_me_streak_fields: VERIFIED - GET /api/auth/me includes prediction_streak and max_prediction_streak
features_verified.streak_banner_component: VERIFIED - StreakBanner renders on HomePage with data-testid='streak-banner'
features_verified.my_streak_card: VERIFIED - My streak card with data-testid='my-streak-card'
features_verified.build_it_state: VERIFIED - Shows 'BUILD IT' label and instruction text when streak=0
features_verified.hot_streak_state: VERIFIED - Shows 'HOT STREAK' label and '2x POINTS' badge when streak >= 5
features_verified.legendary_state: VERIFIED - Shows 'LEGENDARY' label and '4x POINTS' badge when streak >= 10
features_verified.streak_king_banner: VERIFIED - Shows when another user has streak >= 3 with data-testid='streak-king-banner'

features_verified.progress_bar: VERIFIED - Shows progression toward next milestone
